title: Bike Touring - Germany - Up the Rhine from Koventz South to Mainz. 4-18-2010

transcript.text: Am on the shore of the Rhine fixing flat number two for the day. I've discovered that if you
Have a tube that has other patches on it it will get a flat on the patch because I think
Because I just weigh too much. So I'm just going to have to buy all new tubes and if
I get more than a patch or two on the tube I'm just going to throw it away and buy a
New tube. But look at all the castles. There's one. Here goes a biker. Here's one. Check
This one out. This is castle territory. One over there. Got a town over here. Got a castle
Up there. Got a nice looking church over there. And as we go north, I don't see any castles
In the immediate vicinity. Just a boat. Bikers over there. And a boat over there. So it's
